reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente estaba cerrado el lugar para comprar algo para comer o tomar. Los baños cerrados aún para los que cargamos nafta. Todo peor por ser plena temporada de verano.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, the place to buy something to eat or drink was closed. The bathrooms were still closed for those of us who had gas. It was all the worse for wear because it was the height of summer.
